creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
I am unable to build current STABLE (csup RELENG_8 half hour ago),
 I do not use -jX at make, I removed /usr/src and /usr/obj before
 I fetched the fresh sources, CFLAGS are defaults with -s (same as
 you would do stripe binary after building anything). This was with
 ccache enabled and/or disabled, same error:=20
 
 (my system is 8.0-RELEASE-p2)
 
 # make buildworld
 
 (...)
